snippet.title: Die Toten Hosen // Meine Familie [feat. Sammy Amara] (Offizielles Musikvideo)
snippet.description:
Ab heute ist das Video zu „Meine Familie“ online, das wir gemeinsam mit Sammy Amara eingespielt haben. Dieser Broilers-Klassiker stammt von unserem Bonusalbum „Alles muss raus“ und macht den Auftakt zu einer Reihe von Clips, die wir in den nächsten Wochen und Monaten mit einigen unserer Gäste veröffentlichen werden.

Mit Sammy hätte es dafür kaum einen passenderen Auftakt geben können. Die Broilers, die in diesen Sommer auch live intensiv unterwegs sind, gehören seit Jahren zu unserem Freundeskreis und es ist schon seit langer Zeit eine Riesenfreude mit ihnen unter dem Dach von JKP zusammenzuarbeiten.

Erst letzte Woche hat Sammy uns auf einem der beiden Köln-Konzerte besucht und „Meine Familie“ mit uns gesungen. Über diesen Moment haben wir uns riesig gefreut – genauso wie über eure Reaktion.

Und jetzt viel Spaß mit dem Video.

Das dazugehörige Album „Trink aus, wir müssen gehen!“ + Bonusalbum „Alles muss raus!“ ist am 29.05.2026 erschienen und kann hier » https://dietotenhosen.lnk.to/trinkaus als Dreifach-Vinylalbum und Doppel-CD bestellt werden.

Robert Downey Jr., Vanessa Kirby, Joseph Quinn, Ebon Moss-Bachrach, Pedro Pascal, Chris Hemsworth, Anthony Mackie, Sebastian Stan, Florence Pugh, Letitia Wright, Paul Rudd, Patrick Stewart, Ian McKellen, James Marsden, Rebecca Romijn, Alan Cumming, Channing Tatum

Die größten Heldinnen und Helden des Marvel Cinematic Universe treffen auf die Fantastic Four und die X-Men, um sich einer neuen, übermächtigen Bedrohung entgegenzustellen. عەشقا مـــن بـو بــەژنا تـــه       دل بكەسێ قايل نابيت
عەشقا مـــن بـــو بــــەژنا تـــه       دل بكەسێ رازي نابيت
پیــری درەڤـــت ژجـانـیـاتـــه     ناڪەڤـت سەر ڕەنگـــێ تــــه
نێ ڤی دلي بەس تو دڤێی            دنيــا بــەتالـــە بێ تە

دل بوته دینو هاره     عەمر تنێ هژمارە
ڪچێن جحـێل مـــشــەنـه    بخودێ نـه بجـانیـا تـه نـه
هەر سترانا من گۆتێ      هەژی وێ بەژنـــا تـەنــە


پەیڤ : ئەحمەد ھەسنی
ئاواز : بلند ابراھیم


الأربعة و الأربعون

لقد تجاوز عمركِ الأربعين    وما زلتُ أفديكِ بروحي
لكنّكِ في قلبي شابةٌ       أقسم بربِّ القرآن العظيم
لا تجمعي الهموم في قلبي    ولا تقولي إن العمر قد مضى
فكلما رأيتكِ تمضين أمامي     تخورُ قوايَ في روحي وقدميَّ

مهما كبر عمركِ              فإن جمالكِ يزداد إشراقًا
وحبي لقامتكِ الممشوقة  لن يرضى بغيركِ حبيبًا
فالشيخوخة بعيدةٌ عنكِ    ولا تبدو على ملامحكِ
وهذا القلب لا يريد سواكِ       فالدنيا دونكِ سراب

لقد أصبح قلبي عاشقًا هائمًا      والعمرُ عندي مجردُ رقم
كثيراتٌ هنَّ الفتياتُ الشابات   لكن والله ما رأيتُ بجمالكِ
وكلُّ أغنيةٍ أنشدتُها            إنما كانت لقامتكِ وحدها

Kırk Dört

Kırkı geçtin  canım sana hâlâ feda
Ama kalbimde hep gençsin
Kur'an'ın Rabbine yemin olsun

Üzme beni, Ömür bitti. deme
Seni görünce dizimde derman ruhumda güç kalmıyor

Yaşın artsa da güzelliğin hep parlar
İnce boyuna olan aşkım senden başkasını sevmez

Yaşlılık sana uğramaz, yüzüne hiç yakışmaz
Bu kalp senden başkasını istemez, sensiz dünya bomboş

Kalbim sana delice âşık yaş benim için sadece bir sayı
Genç kız çok ama vallahi senin gibi güzelini görmedim

Söylediğim her şarkı sadece senin ince boyun içindi

Forty-Four
You've passed your forties, yet I'd still give my life for you
In my heart you're forever young
 I swear by the Lord of the Holy Qur'an

Don't fill my heart with sorrow, don't say your time has passed.
Whenever I see you walking by
 my strength leaves both my soul and my feet

No matter how the years go by, your beauty only shines brighter.
My heart belongs to your graceful figure
and it will never love another

Old age stays far away from you, it never touches your face.
This heart wants no one but you;
 without you, the world is just a mirage

My heart is hopelessly in love with you
 and to me, age is only a number
There are many young girls, but by God
 I've never seen anyone as beautiful as you

Every song I've ever sung was written only for your graceful beauty

snippet.title: Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War IV – Necron CGI Trailer
snippet.description:
The Necrons have returned. 

Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War IV launches September 17th, 2026, with Commander Edition players gaining access from September 14th through a 3-Day Early Unlock.

Beneath the world of Kronus, ancient tombs stir. Led by the Chronomancer Thothmek, the deathless legions march to war. Awakening from a 60-million-year slumber, the Necrons seek to reclaim their galactic empire and assert their dominance across the universe.

snippet.title: AMORE MIO 🔥- BELLA CIAO - One body, one breath, one last night. | 🔥 Afro House Melodic Techno Remix
snippet.description:
Bella Ciao, Amore Mio by LustDeep — an original song inspired by the legendary folk melody, reimagined as a story of forbidden love. Best experienced back-to-back with 'Sugar Baby — Let Me Be' for the ultimate late-night journey.

"Bella ciao, amore mio" — a story of a final, clandestine farewell. One body, one breath, one last night before the inevitable goodbye.

A sensual deep house & melodic techno duet about forbidden love: his Italian passion against her English longing, a bilingual dialogue over a hypnotic bassline at 124 BPM. The world's most famous farewell song reborn as a love confession.

🎧 For fans of: Sensual Deep House • Melodic Techno • Emotional Electronic • Night Drive Music

🌪 More LustDeep duets:
🔥 NEW HIT! Sugar Baby — Let Me Be (Afro House):  https://youtu.be/xkbH6zkV4ys
